examples: We'll find something, the second tromp answered cheerfully.
"Poor little dog," the first tromp said and put the money into his pocket.
We had just come home from a good tromp in the bush and he was just getting comfortable when, very obligingly, he posed for me.
In 1997 Strobel filled a box with petri dish cultures of endophytes collected on a tromp through a Honduran jungle.
In 1653, Maarten Harpertszoon Tromp was killed following the battle of Terheijde with the English fleet off the Dutch coast.
